data.author: mjcarroll
data.message:
Ros2 reorganize tests (#130)

* Reorganize tests into fixture and consumer package.

* Fix tests and reenable managed tests.

* Disable the use of Boost.

* Fix include path.

* Fix visibility and MSVC __cplusplus version issues.

* Add documentation to the workaround.

* Clean up MSVC warnings.

data.author: bhatsach
data.message:
Add stdc++fs as a target link library for clang compiler on linux (#144)

* Add stdc++fs as a target link library for clang compiler on linux

This change is needed to compile pluginlib package and packages which
depend on it on linux clang compiler

* Add and export stdc++fs lib for linux platform

* Add c++fs library link on all non-Apple *nix platforms.

This change is necessary for building with Clang on Linux. The use of
`UNIX AND NOT APPLE` is cribbed from a bunch of StackOverflow and CMake
mailing list examples to cover non-Apple *nix cases which for ROS 2
today means Linux, basically. But in the future it could also mean
NetBSD or FreeBSD, QNX, or NuttX as long as they provide libc++fs.

data.author: jerry73204
data.message:
Fix compile error with gcc 8.1.0 (#116)

* Fix compile error with gcc 8.1.0

Gcc 8.1.0 fails to compile filesystem_helper.hpp with -std=c++14. The cause is that it passes the check "__has_include(<filesystem>)". However, std::filesystem is not defined. We add an additional check "__cplusplus >= 201703L".

* Avoid incorrect __cpluscplus check with MSVC compiler

data.author: rojkov
data.message:
Switch from TinyXML to TinyXML2 (#52)

The library TinyXML is considered to be unmaintained and
since all future development is focused on TinyXML2 this
patch updates pluginlib to use TinyXML2.

Signed-off-by: Dmitry Rozhkov <dmitry.rozhkov@linux.intel.com>

data.author: jspricke
data.message:
Remove Boost Software License from license tag

The Boost Software License was only in there for Poco, as can be seen in
6e0659f. As Poco was removed in 44ab6fb and all remaining Files have a
BSD header, let's remove the Boost tag as well, to be consistent.

data.author: hershwg
data.message: pluginlib: added a pure-virtual base class for ClassLoader called ClassLoaderBase, which is not templated.  Only one function of ClassLoader is actually templated.  This allows client code to not be templated where it doesn't need to be.
